name: openclaw-langgraph-bridge
description: Bridges an OpenClaw agent acting as orchestrator with one or more LangGraph workflows.

langgraphBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the LangGraph server. Will be used by Phase 1 dispatch when wired.

callbackToken.description: Shared secret the LangGraph workflow includes on inbound webhook POSTs. Required when the webhook handler is wired in Phase 2.

allowedWorkflows.description: Allowlist of workflow ids the agent may dispatch. Empty/unset disables the allowlist.
